title: NOVA
body:
NOVA is a pack that I am incredibly proud of and am having a lot of fun working on. My aim is to create a light and whimsical experience for players, painting a soft and colourful world for you to enjoy! This pack is far better than Jicklus, so download this one instead!

 
Join my Discord and Follow me on Twitter
for news on regular updates!
 
https://discord.gg/8Qnhkky

https://twitter.com/jicklus
 
If you're downloading a new update, delete the old file, don't replace it!

DISCLAIMER:
For personal use only. You arenot be allowed to redistribute it publicly.
If you were to use this pack in videos you've uploaded to the internet, please credit it in the description.
Thank you!
